An announcement from Hang Pin Living Technology Company Limited ( (HK:1682) ) is now available.

Hang Pin Living Technology Company Limited announced the disposal of 200,000 PetroChina shares, generating approximately HK$1,688,000 in proceeds, excluding transaction costs. This transaction allows the company to realize its investment in PetroChina, resulting in a gain of approximately HK$549,000. The disposal is classified as a discloseable transaction under the Hong Kong Stock Exchange’s listing rules, requiring reporting and announcement due to the applicable percentage ratios exceeding 5% but remaining below 25%.

Beijing Yunji Technology Co. Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2670) ) has provided an announcement.

Beijing Yunji Technology Co., Ltd. has announced an extraordinary general meeting (EGM) to be held on December 26, 2025. The meeting will address several special resolutions, including changes to the company name, amendments to the Articles of Association, and various procedural rules. Additionally, the board will seek approval to issue new shares not exceeding 20% of the total issued shares and to repurchase H shares up to 10% of the total issued H shares. These resolutions could significantly impact the company’s governance and capital structure, potentially affecting shareholder value and market positioning.

Orient Overseas (International) Limited announced a change in its shareholding structure, where Faulkner Global Holdings Limited, a subsidiary of COSCO SHIPPING Holdings (Hong Kong) Limited, has sold its shares to COSCO SHIPPING HK. data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium and Invest with Confidence

  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis so your portfolio is always positioned for maximum potential

Wise Living Technology Co., Ltd Class H ( (HK:2481) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Wise Living Technology Co., Ltd has entered into a Capital Increase Agreement with Shuangliang Strategic, resulting in a deemed disposal of a subsidiary. This agreement will see Shuangliang Strategic invest RMB4,000,000 into Shuangliang Ruineng, increasing its registered capital from RMB6,000,000 to RMB10,000,000. Consequently, Wise Living Technology’s equity interest in Shuangliang Ruineng will decrease from 100% to 60%, while Shuangliang Strategic’s interest will rise to 40%. This transaction, categorized as a connected transaction under the Listing Rules, highlights Wise Living Technology’s strategic move to optimize its capital structure and enhance its market positioning.

More about Wise Living Technology Co., Ltd Class H

Wise Living Technology Co., Ltd is a joint stock limited liability company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China, operating in the technology sector. The company focuses on innovative technology solutions and services, with a market focus that includes strategic partnerships and capital investments.
